xml.log: If there is an update when the file file is missing, go to Steam Client - Library List - mydockfinder - right-click menu - Properties - Local File - Verify software file integrity If the desktop icon is not displayed after enabling pre-stage scheduling, you can right-click on the desktop-view-display desktop icon to enable display desktop icon If using MSI afterburner will cause irregular freezing or crashing issues, you can set it in MSI afterburner, add dock_64.exe, then select dock_64.exe, and finally select "None" on the right side. Changelog 1.Fix Control Panel icon on dock also showing a run indicator after closing the Control Panel window 2.Fixed the Dock Control Panel icon not storing the style of the last time the Control Panel was opened 3.Fix: Finder not showing available time when battery time is less than 60 minutes remaining 4.The Finder battery icon increases the low color change, orange below 20%, red below 10% 5.Finder Battery Menu Adds Battery Health Display (To Be Experimented) 6.After dragging the dock icon to leave the dock, press the Ctrl or Shift or Alt keys to toggle the removal or create shortcut status, you can drag and drop the icon to the desktop or explorer window to create a shortcut 7.Fixed an issue where the drag window could not be activated by clicking the Schedule Window list after moving between two screens 8.Fixed the issue that the WeChat tray icon was located down the right-click menu 9.Add the adjustment program tray icon activation function, you can click the program you want to adjust in the preferences - tray, and then select the adjustment tray icon activation method, after selecting the activation method, the right-click menu will be automatically activated for testing, if the right-click menu can be displayed normally to prove that the method is correct, If the menu does not appear, choose another method 10.Fixed the issue that some buttons would be out of sync after switching between light and dark in the previous version of MyFinder 11.Fixed the issue of some icon masks on the launchpad showing strokes 12.Adjust the way the gradient blurs screenshot to prevent crashes 13.Set shortcut key display dock support activating the dock in desktop display mode 14.Port some of Microsoft's WIN2D functions, no longer rely on the WIN2D library, prevent conflicts with other programs, and improve stability
